title: Semantic role naming output (Phase 6.4)
description: Per-token semantic naming. Input is a list of harvested token paths + values + occurrence counts; output is the same paths annotated with human-readable display names, role descriptions, and the components/areas they appear in. Token paths are referenced, never minted.

roleDescription.description: One-sentence role description shown in the live preview palette. Plain prose, no markdown.

whereUsed.description: Selectors of components that visibly use this token. Drawn from the harvested probe set.
